violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. Certified food managers listed on license are no longer working at this location. There is no current certified food manager. Certified food manager course should be taken by someone on site as soon as possible.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. Only one hand washing sink is available in this establishment. The location of the hand washing sink in the pizza production area does not allow easy access when washing dishes, wall in between areas. Hand washing sinks should be easily accessible.

General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Food employee returned from delivering items and did not wash her hands before beginning food prep duties. Hands should be washed when entering the kitchen, before beginning tasks.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Multiple wet wiping cloths found on the table near the three compartment sink. Wiping cloths should be stored in a sanitizing solution between uses or laundered.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. Only one hand washing sink is available in this establishment. The location of the hand washing sink in the pizza production area does not allow easy access when washing dishes. Hand washing sinks should be easily accessible.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Multiple dirty wiping cloths were found on the back prep counter during inspection. Dirty wiping cloths should be placed in a sanitizing solution between uses or laundered.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not kept clean or maintained. Hand sink near the prep table was found dirty during inspection. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.
